name: query-oauth-device-code
bodyMarkdown:
# OAuth Device Code Phishing Detection Query

**Category:** Detection Chokepoints | **Maturity:** Hunt | **FP Rate:** Low
**Techniques:** T1550.001 | **Log Sources:** Entra ID SigninLogs

```kql
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where AuthenticationProtocol == "deviceCode"
| where AppId == "29d9ed98-a469-4536-ade2-f981bc1d605e"
| where ResultType == 0
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, AppId, AppDisplayName, AuthenticationProtocol, IsInteractive, IPAddress
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
```
